title: Communauté d'agglomération de la Région Dieppoise
summary: The Communauté d'agglomération de la région Dieppoise, also known as Dieppe Maritime  is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the city of Dieppe. It is located in the Seine-Maritime department, in the Normandy region, northern France. It was created on 31 December 2002. Its area is 129.0 km2. Its population was 46,223 in 2018, of which 28,561 in Dieppe proper.
text:
The Communauté d'agglomération de la région Dieppoise, also known as Dieppe Maritime  is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the city of Dieppe. It is located in the Seine-Maritime department, in the Normandy region, northern France. It was created on 31 December 2002. Its area is 129.0 km2. Its population was 46,223 in 2018, of which 28,561 in Dieppe proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 16 communes:
